name: wjlgatech-plugins
description: Paul Wu's reusable Claude Code plugins, distributed from the SOS repo so they work on any machine.

plugins.name: sos
plugins.description: Objective-driven dev loop (/goal-10x), the Plan→Code→Validate ship loop (/ship-loop with lavish, treehouse, no-mistakes), the freellmapi free unified-LLM backend, plus skills: living-knowledge explanations, CopilotKit integration, the future-self framework, and knowledge-graph (build topic & persona knowledge graphs from multi-source, engagement-ranked evidence).
